name: tiktok-skills
description: 5 Claude Code and Codex skills for TikTok marketing: first 1-3 second hook scripting (spoken line plus on-screen text), caption writing under 2,200 chars with TikTok settings and hashtags, trend and sound mapping for your niche, an AI-script humanizer with pre-film audit, and weekly content planning around completion rate. Publora is the default publish layer for the rendered video.
